description: Income support of INR 6,000 per year paid in three equal instalments directly into farmer bank accounts.
eligibility: Small and marginal landholding farmers with valid records.
how_to_apply: Register with state agriculture department or Common Service Centre with Aadhaar, bank passbook, land records.

languages.en: PM-KISAN gives INR 6,000 annually in three instalments to eligible farmers via DBT.
languages.hi: पीएम-किसान के तहत योग्य किसानों को हर साल डीबीटी से 6,000 रुपये तीन किश्तों में मिलते हैं।
languages.mr: पीएम-किसान योजनेत पात्र शेतकऱ्यांना दरवर्षी तीन हफ्त्यांत रुपये 6,000 थेट खात्यात मिळतात.

description: Crop insurance covering yield loss from natural calamities, pests and diseases with low farmer premium share.
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas including sharecroppers and tenant farmers.
how_to_apply: Enroll through banks, CSCs, or the PMFBY portal before sowing deadlines.

languages.en: PMFBY protects against crop loss from weather, pest or disease with subsidised premium.
languages.hi: पीएमएफबीवाई मौसम, कीट या रोग से फसल नुकसान पर प्रीमियम सब्सिडी के साथ सुरक्षा देती है।
languages.mr: पीएमएफबीवाय हवामान, किड किंवा रोगांमुळे होणारे पीक नुकसान अनुदानित प्रीमियमसह कव्हर करते.

description: Online trading platform connecting 1000+ mandis for transparent price discovery and distant bidding.
eligibility: Registered APMC traders, commission agents, farmers having KYC.
how_to_apply: Register on e-NAM portal or facilitation centre with Aadhaar and bank details.

languages.en: e-NAM lets farmers receive bids from mandis nationwide and compare prices instantly.
languages.hi: ई-नाम से किसान देशभर की मंडियों से बोली मंगाकर तुरंत दाम तुलना कर सकते हैं।
languages.mr: ई-नॅम प्लॅटफॉर्मने देशभरातील बाजारातून लिलाव बोल्या तत्काळ पाहता येतात.

ministry: Department of Agriculture Cooperation & Farmers Welfare
description: Support package for Farmer Producer Organisations with equity grant, credit guarantee and cluster-based business services.
eligibility: Registered farmer collectives with minimum member thresholds.
how_to_apply: Apply through implementing agencies like SFAC, NABARD or NCDC with bylaws and bank details.

languages.en: Government funds FPO formation, provides equity grant up to INR 15 lakh and credit guarantee cover.
languages.hi: सरकार एफपीओ गठन पर 15 लाख रुपये तक की इक्विटी अनुदान और ऋण गारंटी देती है।
languages.mr: सरकार एफपीओ स्थापनासाठी 15 लाखांपर्यंत इक्विटी अनुदान व कर्ज हमी देते.
